intrusionCountermeasures.name: Barrier
intrusionCountermeasures.effect: Blocks pathway. Must be crashed or bypassed with Sleaze.

intrusionCountermeasures.name: Encryption
intrusionCountermeasures.effect: Protects datafile. Requires Crack Protections or Decrypt.

intrusionCountermeasures.name: Databomb
intrusionCountermeasures.effect: Self-deletes file on unauthorized access. Requires Kill Switch.

intrusionCountermeasures.name: System Sweep
intrusionCountermeasures.effect: Immediate Hacking vs Sys/Sec test for all falsified marks in system.

intrusionCountermeasures.name: Security Decker
intrusionCountermeasures.effect: Skilled hacker NPC with cyberdeck and utilities.
